theory.canonical_statement: ID 481 formalizes the inherent multi qubit processing of the Tripartite architecture. Unlike classical systems requiring series of two qubit gates, the Trawin Zero Point naturally facilitates a three way interaction between the Temporal, Atemporal, and Mediator channels. This allows for the simultaneous processing of 17.23 bits per transition. Parallel Integration: Information from the three channels is integrated at the stagnation point. Geometric Synergy: The algebraic signal acts as the gate timing constant for the tripartite cycle.
